v1FieldFilter.description: Filter resources by fields. A subset of expr-lang is supported. See https://expr-lang.org/docs/language-definition for usage details.
v1FieldFilter.name: filter

v1NetworkAreaID.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT Network Area.
v1NetworkAreaID.name: areaId

v1NetworkID.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT Network.
v1NetworkID.name: networkId

v1NetworkRangeID.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT Network Range.
v1NetworkRangeID.name: networkRangeId

v1OrganizationID.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT Organization.
v1OrganizationID.name: organizationId

v1ProjectID.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT Project.
v1ProjectID.name: projectId

v1Region.description: The STACKIT Region of the resources.
v1Region.name: region

v1RouteID.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT Route.
v1RouteID.name: routeId

v1VPCID.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the target STACKIT VPC in the request path.
v1VPCID.name: vpcId

v2RoutingTableID.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT Routing Table.
v2RoutingTableID.name: routingTableId

value.msg: The affinity group policy is not supported
boot device size is not valid or missing
request body has an error: doesn't match schema: Error at "/name": value must be a string

FailedDependency.description: The region of the vpc is not enabled.

InternalServerError.description: Internal Server Error, returns a 500 if something is broken on IaaS API Side.

Unauthorized.description: A request which was not authorized.

AddRoutesToRoutingTablePayload.description: Object represents a request to add network routes.

AddRoutingTableToAreaPayload.description: An object representing a routing table. Filterable Fields: `dynamicRoutes`, `systemRoutes`.

default.description: This is the default routing table. It can't be deleted and is used if the user does not specify it otherwise.

AddVPCRoutingTablePayload.description: An object representing a VPC routing table. Filterable Fields: `createdAt`, `dynamicRoutes`, `name`, `systemRoutes`, `updatedAt`.

CreateNetworkIPv4.description: The create request for an IPv4 network.

CreateNetworkIPv4WithPrefix.description: The create request for an IPv4 network with a specified prefix.

CreateNetworkIPv4WithPrefixLength.description: The create request for an IPv4 network with a wanted prefix length.

CreateNetworkIPv6.description: The create request for an IPv6 network.

CreateNetworkIPv6WithPrefix.description: The create request for an IPv6 network with a specified prefix.

CreateNetworkIPv6WithPrefixLength.description: The create request for an IPv6 network with a wanted prefix length.

CreateNetworkPayload.description: Object that represents the request body for a network create.

vpcId.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT VPC.

CreateVPCNetworkRangePayload.description: The request body of a VPC network range.

CreateVPCPayload.description: Object that represents a create VPC request.

CreateVPCRegionPayload.description: The basic properties of a regional VPC.

DHCP.description: Enable or disable DHCP for a network.

Description.description: Description Object. Allows string up to 255 Characters.
Description.example: cool description dude. Wanna play some Snakeybus?

DynamicRoutes.description: A config setting for a routing table which allows propagation of dynamic routes to this routing table.

Error.description: Error with HTTP error code and an error message.

GenericName.description: The name for a General Object. Matches Names and also UUIDs.

IPv4.description: String that represents an IPv4 address.

IPv6.description: String that represents an IPv6 address.

Labels.description: Object that represents the labels of an object. Regex for keys: `^(?=.{1,63}$)([A-Za-z0-9][-A-Za-z0-9_.]*)?[A-Za-z0-9]$`. Regex for values: `^(?=.{0,63}$)(([A-Za-z0-9][-A-Za-z0-9_.]*)?[A-Za-z0-9])*$`. Providing a `null` value for a key will remove that key. The `stackit-` prefix is reserved and cannot be used for Keys.

NameserversIPv4.description: A list containing DNS Servers/Nameservers for IPv4.

NameserversIPv6.description: A list containing DNS Servers/Nameservers for IPv6.

Network.description: Object that represents a network. If no routing table is specified, the default routing table is used.

vpcId.description: The identifier (ID) of a STACKIT VPC.

NetworkGatewayIPv4.description: The IPv4 gateway of a network. If not specified the first IP of the network will be assigned as the gateway. If 'null' is sent, then the network doesn't have a gateway.

NetworkGatewayIPv6.description: The IPv6 gateway of a network. If not specified the first IP of the network will be assigned as the gateway. If 'null' is sent, then the network doesn't have a gateway.

NetworkIPv4.description: Object that represents the IPv4 part of a network.

NetworkIPv6.description: Object that represents the IPv6 part of a network.

NetworkRangeDefaultPrefixLengthIPv4.description: The default prefix length for network ranges in the VPC.

NetworkRangeIPv4Request.description: Contains the IPv4 properties of a VPC network range request. Filterable Fields: `defaultPrefixLen`, `maxPrefixLen`, `minPrefixLen`, `nameservers`, `prefix`.

NetworkRangeMaxPrefixLengthIPv4.description: The maximal prefix length for network ranges in the VPC.

NetworkRangeMinPrefixLengthIPv4.description: The minimal prefix length for network ranges in the VPC.

NetworkRangePrefixLengthIPv6.description: The ipv6 prefix lengths for subnets or network ranges in the VPC.

NexthopBlackhole.description: Object that represents a blackhole route.

NexthopIPv4.description: Object that represents an IPv4 address.

NexthopIPv6.description: Object that represents an IPv6 address.

NexthopInternet.description: Object that represents a route to the internet.

PartialUpdateNetworkPayload.description: Object that represents the request body for a network update.

PartialUpdateVPCPayload.description: Object that represents a update VPC request.

RegionalVPC.description: The basic properties of a regional VPC.

RegionalVPCIPv4.description: The regional IPv4 config of a VPC.

ResourceState.description:
The state of a resource object.
Possible values: `CREATING`, `CREATED`, `DELETING`, `DELETED`, `FAILED`, `UPDATED`, `UPDATING`.

Routed.description: Shows if the network is routed and therefore accessible from other networks.

RoutingTable.description: An object representing a routing table. Filterable Fields: `dynamicRoutes`, `systemRoutes`.

default.description: This is the default routing table. It can't be deleted and is used if the user does not specify it otherwise.

SystemRoutes.description: A config setting for a routing table which allows installation of automatic system routes for connectivity between projects in the same SNA.

UpdateDynamicRoutes.description: The update config setting for a routing table which allows propagation of dynamic routes to this routing table.

UpdateNetworkIPv4Body.description: The config object for a IPv4 network update.

UpdateNetworkIPv6Body.description: The config object for a IPv6 network update.

UpdateRouteOfRoutingTablePayload.description: Object that represents the request body for a route update.

UpdateRoutingTableOfAreaPayload.description: Object that represents the request body for a routing table update.

UpdateSystemRoutes.description: The update config setting for a routing table which allows installation of automatic system routes for connectivity between projects in the same SNA.

UpdateVPCNetworkRangePayload.description: Object that represents the request body for a VPC network range update.

UpdateVPCRegionPayload.description: The basic properties of a regional VPC.

UpdateVPCRoutingTablePayload.description: Object that represents the request body for a routing table update.

UpdateVPCStaticRoutePayload.description: Object that represents the request body for a route update.

UpdatedAt.description: Date-time when resource was last updated.

VPC.description: Object that represents a VPC. Filterable Fields: `name`.

VPCBaseNetworkRange.description: Contains the common properties of a VPC network range.

VPCNetworkRangeIPv4.description: Contains the IPv4 properties of a VPC network range.

VPCNetworkRangeIPv6.description: Contains the IPv6 properties of a VPC network range.

VPCRoutingTable.description: An object representing a VPC routing table. Filterable Fields: `createdAt`, `dynamicRoutes`, `name`, `systemRoutes`, `updatedAt`.

v1UpdateVPCNetworkRangeIPv4.description: Contains the IPv4 properties of a VPC network range update.

ipVersion.description: The IP version of the network range being updated.

v3NetworkRangeList.description: A list of VPC network ranges.

v3RoutingTableList.description: A list of VPC routing tables.

info.description: This API allows you to create and modify IaaS resources.
info.title: STACKIT IaaS API

get.description: Get a list of all routing tables in a network area.
get.summary: List all routing tables in a network area.

post.description: Create a new routing table in an existing network area.

requestBody.description: Request an addition of a routing table to an area.

post.summary: Create new routing table in a network area.

delete.description: Delete a routing table of a network area.

204.description: Delete request for the routing table has been accepted.

get.description: Get details about a routing table defined in a network area.
get.summary: Get details about a routing table.

patch.description: Update a routing table defined in a network area.

requestBody.description: Request an update of a routing table.

200.description: Update request for routing table successful.

get.description: Get a list of all networks in a routing table of a network area.
get.summary: List all networks in a routing table.

get.description: Get a list of all routes in a routing table of a network area.
get.summary: List all routes in a routing table.

post.description: Create new routes in an existing routing table of a network area.

requestBody.description: Request an addition of routes to a routing table.

201.description: Adding routes to routing table was successful.

post.summary: Create new routes in a routing table.

delete.description: Delete a route in an existing routing table of a network area.

204.description: Delete request for the route has been accepted.

delete.summary: Delete a route in a routing table.

get.description: Get details about a route defined in a routing table of a network area.

200.description: Show the details of a route in a routing table.

get.summary: Get details about a route of a routing table.

patch.description: Update a route defined in a routing table of a network area.

requestBody.description: Request an update of a route in a routing table.

patch.summary: Update a route of a routing table.

get.description: Get a list of all networks inside a project.

200.description: List all networks of a project.

get.summary: List all networks inside a project.

post.description: Create a new network in a project. `nameservers` will be filled from `defaultNameservers` of the respective area if not specified. If the project has `internetAccess` enabled and this is the first network in the project this might incur cost.

delete.description: Delete a network. If the network is still in use, the deletion will fail.

202.description: Delete request for network has been accepted.

get.description: Get details about a network of a project.

patch.description: Update the settings of a network inside a project.

requestBody.description: Request an update of a network.

get.description: List all visible VPCs of this project. To list shared VPCs from other projects of the organization use the `List all shared VPCs` endpoint.

200.description: Get a list of all VPCs.

post.description: Create a new VPC in a project.

delete.description: Delete an existing VPC in a project.

get.description: Get details about a VPC in a project.

patch.description: Update the settings of a VPC.

get.description: Get a list of all configured regions in a VPC.
get.summary: List all configured regions in a VPC.

delete.description: Delete the current configuration of a region for a VPC.

202.description: Delete request for the regional VPC has been accepted.

delete.summary: Delete the regional configuration of a VPC.

get.description: Get the current configuration of a region for a VPC.
get.summary: Get the regional configuration of a VPC.

requestBody.description: Request an update of the regional VPC configuration.

200.description: Regional VPC configuration has been updated.

patch.summary: Update the regional configuration of a VPC.

put.description: Create the configuration of a region for a VPC.

requestBody.description: Request to add a new regional VPC configuration.

202.description: Configure VPC in a new region was accepted.

put.summary: Create the regional configuration of a VPC.

get.description: Get a list of all network ranges in a VPC for this region.
get.summary: List all regional network ranges in a VPC.

post.description: Create a new network range in an existing VPC for this region.

requestBody.description: Request to add an additional network range to a VPC.

202.description: Create request for a network range has been accepted.

post.summary: Create new regional network ranges in a VPC.

delete.description: Delete a network range of a VPC for this region, if the network range is not used anymore.

202.description: Delete request for network range has been accepted.

get.description: Get details about a network range in a VPC for this region.
get.summary: Get details about a regional network range.

patch.description: Update a network range of a VPC for this region.

requestBody.description: Request an update of a network range.

get.description: Get a list of all routing tables in a VPC for this region.
get.summary: List all regional routing tables in a VPC.

post.description: Create a new routing table in an existing VPC for this region.

requestBody.description: Request an addition of a routing table to a VPC.

post.summary: Create a new regional routing table in a VPC.

delete.description: Delete a routing table of a VPC for this region.

get.description: Get details about a routing table of a VPC for this region.
get.summary: Get details about a regional routing table.

patch.description: Update a routing table of a VPC for this region.

requestBody.description: Request an update of a routing table.

200.description: Update request for routing table successful.

get.description: Get a list of all static routes of a VPC for this region.
get.summary: List all regional static routes in a VPC.

post.description: Create a new static route in the VPC for this region.

requestBody.description: Request to add a static route to a VPC.

delete.description: Delete a static route of a VPC for this region.

204.description: Delete request for the static route has been accepted.

get.description: Get details about a static route of a VPC for this region.
get.summary: Get details about a regional static route.

patch.description: Update a static route of a VPC for this region.

requestBody.description: Request an update of a static route.

200.description: Update request for static route successful.
